title: sida alii var. ovata
intro: Sida alii var. ovata, also known as the Sida plant, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family, Malvaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sida alii var. ovata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant is often prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is used in traditional folk medicine in many parts of the world.
